sections.title: 1. N+1-style Query Patterns
2. Redundant Computations
3. Caching Opportunities
4. Memory Leak Risks
5. Build / Bundle Quick Wins
Priority Order
sections.content:
1. **Lazy-load Fuse.js + ExcelJS** — ~250KB main bundle reduction, ~10 min work
2. **Cache prices fetch** — eliminates re-fetch on every `/list` visit
3. **Cache cookie parsing** — removes O(N) parse on every startup read
4. **Event delegation on supplement grid** — drops 300+ listeners to 1
5. **Debounce analytics wildcard listener** — prevents per-keystroke activity recording
6. **VirtualScroller `transform` swap** — eliminates layout thrashing on scroll
